components_home_FeatureCards.card1Body: Learn with quick five-second insights designed to be memorable and easy to revisit anytime.

components_home_FeatureCards.card6Body: Build lasting study habits with daily reminders, streaks, and motivating progress tracking.

app_marketing_about_page.titleMain: We believe learning shouldn't compete with scrolling.
app_marketing_about_page.titleAccent: So we made it the same thing.
app_marketing_about_page.subtitle: StudyBooks turns real, published studybooks into short, beautifully designed cards — so the five minutes you already spend scrolling can leave you a little smarter.
app_marketing_about_page.value1Body: Every card is written to respect your time and your intelligence — five seconds, real substance.
app_marketing_about_page.value2Title: Built for the habit, not the binge
app_marketing_about_page.value2Body: We optimize for a daily streak that lasts a year, not a weekend of doom-scrolling.
app_marketing_about_page.value3Body: Nothing is invented. Every card traces back to a real author, a real page, a real idea.
app_marketing_about_page.value4Body: Our roadmap is shaped by the people using StudyBooks every single day.
app_marketing_about_page.timeline1Body: Two former teachers, tired of watching students scroll past anything longer than a paragraph, started sketching a different kind of feed.
app_marketing_about_page.timeline2Body: We partnered with independent authors to turn real studybooks into short, structured insight cards.
app_marketing_about_page.timeline3Body: Streaks, reminders, and a redesigned feed helped our first cohort read every single day for a month.
app_marketing_about_page.timeline4Body: StudyBooks is now a daily ritual for tens of thousands of curious minds — and we're just getting started.
app_marketing_about_page.quote: “We're not trying to replace books. We're trying to be the reason you finally pick one up.”

app_marketing_contact_page.title: Say hello. We actually read these.
app_marketing_contact_page.subtitle: Questions, feedback, partnership ideas, or just want to tell us your current streak? Pick a channel below or use the form.
app_marketing_contact_page.channel1Body: For partnerships, press, or anything that needs a paper trail.
app_marketing_contact_page.channel2Body: In-app chat inside the StudyBooks app gets the fastest reply.
app_marketing_contact_page.channel3Body: We're a small, remote-first team based across three timezones.
app_marketing_contact_page.successBody: Thanks for reaching out — we usually reply within one business day.
app_marketing_contact_page.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's on your mind...

app_marketing_privacy_page.title: Privacy Policy
app_marketing_privacy_page.subtitle: Last updated July 1, 2026. This explains what we collect, why, and the choices you have.
app_marketing_privacy_page.s1Body1: We collect the information you give us directly — your name, email address, and any reading preferences you set up when you create a StudyBooks account.
app_marketing_privacy_page.s1Body2: We also collect usage data automatically: which cards you read, how long you spend on them, and your streak history. This helps us build a feed that actually fits how you learn.
app_marketing_privacy_page.s2Body1: Your data powers the core product: personalizing your feed, tracking your streak, and syncing your progress across devices.
app_marketing_privacy_page.s2Body2: We use aggregated, de-identified usage data to improve card design and decide which studybooks to license next. We never sell your personal data to advertisers.
app_marketing_privacy_page.s3Body1: We share data with service providers who help us run StudyBooks — hosting, analytics, and customer support tools — under contracts that limit what they can do with it.
app_marketing_privacy_page.s3Body2: We may disclose information if required by law, or to protect the rights, property, or safety of StudyBooks, our users, or the public.
app_marketing_privacy_page.s4Body1: You can access, correct, or delete your account data at any time from Settings, or by contacting us directly.
app_marketing_privacy_page.s4Body2: Depending on where you live, you may have additional rights under laws like the GDPR or CCPA — including the right to data portability and the right to object to certain processing.
app_marketing_privacy_page.s5Body1: We use industry-standard encryption in transit and at rest, and limit internal access to personal data on a need-to-know basis.
app_marketing_privacy_page.s5Body2: No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure, so while we work hard to protect your information, we can't guarantee absolute security.
app_marketing_privacy_page.s6Body1: We'll update this page if our practices change, and for material changes we'll let you know via email or an in-app notice before they take effect.
app_marketing_privacy_page.questions: Questions about this policy? Reach us at <link>our contact page</link>.

app_marketing_terms_page.title: Terms of Service
app_marketing_terms_page.subtitle: Last updated July 1, 2026. The short version: be decent, don't resell our content, and we'll keep building the best five minutes of your day.
app_marketing_terms_page.s1Body: You must be at least 13 years old to create a StudyBooks account. You're responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for all activity that happens under your account. Don't use StudyBooks for anything illegal, or in a way that disrupts the service for other learners.
app_marketing_terms_page.s2Body: Any notes, highlights, or lists you create remain yours. By using StudyBooks, you grant us a limited license to store and display that content back to you, and — only if you explicitly choose to share it — to other users.
app_marketing_terms_page.s3Body: Card content is drawn from studybooks we've licensed from authors and publishers. You may not copy, redistribute, or resell card content outside the app. Screenshots for personal, non-commercial sharing are fine.
app_marketing_terms_page.s4Body: Premium plans renew automatically at the end of each billing cycle unless cancelled beforehand. Prices are shown in your local currency at checkout and may change with 30 days' notice for existing subscribers.
app_marketing_terms_page.s5Body: You can cancel anytime from Settings — you'll keep access until the end of your current billing period. Refunds are handled case-by-case; contact support within 14 days of a charge if something went wrong.
app_marketing_terms_page.s6Body: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, misuse the platform, or attempt to extract card content at scale. You can delete your account at any time from Settings.
app_marketing_terms_page.s7Body: StudyBooks is provided "as is." We work hard to keep the catalog accurate, but we don't guarantee that every summary is complete or error-free — cards are meant to spark curiosity, not replace the full studybook.
app_marketing_terms_page.s8Body: We may update these terms as the product evolves. We'll notify you of material changes by email or in-app notice before they take effect.
app_marketing_terms_page.questions: Questions about these terms? Reach us at <link>our contact page</link>.

catalog.synopsis: Компактный учебник по предмету «{subject}», вдохновлённый книгой «{title}» — короткие карточки, которые можно пройти между занятиями.
catalog.synopsisPlain: Компактный учебник, вдохновлённый книгой «{title}» — короткие карточки, которые можно пройти между занятиями.

card.bigIdeaBody: Быстрый вход в тему «{subject}»: одна ключевая идея из «{title}», сжатая в один фрагмент, который действительно запомнится.
card.rememberBody: Большая часть темы «{subject}» держится на нескольких простых идеях. Эта карточка выделяет ту, что делает основную работу.
card.mattersBody: Где это встречается в реальной жизни — и почему стоит потратить две минуты на изучение.
